scripts.build:css: npm run build:clean && npm run build:concat && npm run build:minify
scripts.build:concat: mkdir -p assets/css/prod && concat -o assets/css/prod/main.css assets/css/_variables.css assets/css/_components.css assets/css/_utilities.css assets/css/styles.css assets/css/dark-theme.css assets/css/tickets.css assets/css/stats-v2.css assets/css/stats-tech.css
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:purge
